title: All Things Bakelite: The Age of Plastic
original_title: All Things Bakelite: The Age of Plastic
overview: In 1907, Belgian-born American chemist Leo Hendrik Baekeland made one of the most transformative discoveries of the 20th century: Bakelite. It was the first wholly synthetic plastic and ushered in an explosion of new man-made materials that marked the beginnings of our modern industrial age.
